ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine offered */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for reservations and inquiries */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the restaurant's social media profiles */,
  "menu_pdf" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's menu in PDF format */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine type from the cuisines table */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of a meal at the restaurant */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant is currently open */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the restaurant profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menus" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant to which this menu item belongs */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g., Appetizer, Main Course) */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the menu item is vegetarian */,
  "is_vegan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the menu item is vegan */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the menu item is gluten-free */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calorie count of the menu item */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* Any allergens in the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the menu item */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the menu item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the menu item was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the restaurant (out of 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text comment of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is anonymous */,
  "votes_up" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "votes_down" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified customer who has made a purchase */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the review was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, restaurant_owner, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has staff privileges */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has superuser privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant for which the reservation is made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the reservation */,
  "number_of_people" INTEGER /* Number of people for the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "table_number" TEXT /* Table number assigned for the reservation */,
  "special_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions for the reservation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reservation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the reservation was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotional offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image for the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the promotion */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum amount a customer must spend to avail the promotion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the promotion was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant at this location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the restaurant is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for the restaurant location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant at this location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours for the specific location */,
  "parking_info" TEXT /* Information about parking availability */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the location record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine type */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the cuisine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cuisine record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the cuisine record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating given to the menu item */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Short review or comment along with the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is anonymous */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the rating was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menus ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant from which the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_items" TEXT /* JSON array of order items and their quantities */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the order was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special request */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation associated with the request */,
  "special_request" TEXT /* Details of the special request made by the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the special request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the special request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the special request was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_requests_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)
